title: Power Integrations (POWI) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Power Integrations reported a 9% sequential increase in revenues for Q3 2024, reaching $115.8 million, up 9% from the previous quarter but down 8% year-over-year. The company achieved a non-GAAP gross margin of 55.1% and non-GAAP earnings of 40 cents per share, slightly above guidance. Power Integrations came out with quarterly earnings of $0.40 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.36 per share. The revenue outlook for the fourth quarter is projected to decrease to $105 million, reflecting a soft demand environment. Power Integrations has a healthy balance sheet, allowing for a 5% dividend increase and authorization of $50 million for share repurchases. Power Integrations expects strong growth in 2025, particularly in the industrial segment, driven by high power and high voltage DC transmission projects. The company continues to invest in strategic areas including automotive EV supply chains and data center power solutions.
